items.title: Andrew Wiggins declining his player option and re-signing on a long-term deal at a lower starting salary could create enough apron space to re-sign Norman Powell.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Andrew Wiggins declining his player option and re-signing on a long-term deal at a lower starting salary could create enough apron space to re-sign Norman Powell.

But after seeing some of today's trades and contracts, Wiggins' market could be too strong for that to be feasible.

Here's where the Timberwolves roster and salary cap sits after the Randle trade and Dosunmu signing.

They can use the full $15 million mid-level exception and the $5.5 million bi-annual exception. Using either (or the trade exception they created tonight) would mean they cannot exceed the 1st apron

items.title: giannis trade will be folded into tmw's post-draft pod but initial thoughts:
items.author: dan favale
items.body_excerpt:
giannis trade will be folded into tmw's post-draft pod but initial thoughts:

—heat gave up a ton, but nothing/no one that profiles as primetime 
—miami still *isn't* a contender, but *is* much better
—bucks did extremely well after the circumstances
—those circumstances being they waited too long

items.title: Only one Heat team has won 50+ games since LeBron left
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Only one Heat team has won 50+ games since LeBron left

The 2021-22 squad went 53-29 and was East #1 despite Jimmy Butler and Bam Adebayo missing 25+ games each

Top-5 defense with 5 guys hitting 100+ 3s

(and that team lost Game 7 ECF at home vs ... the Boston Celtics)

items.title: Myles Turner feels like a natural trade candidate now. But with the way veterans seem more valued this week post-lottery flattening, perhaps the Bucks keep him to help avoid the relegation zone.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Myles Turner feels like a natural trade candidate now. But with the way veterans seem more valued this week post-lottery flattening, perhaps the Bucks keep him to help avoid the relegation zone.

Most teams would need to send out $21.6 million to acquire him with his trade bonus.
